news.t: Inverse Gold ETFs Poised to Move Higher as FOMC Minutes Loom

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Gold (GLL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Gold Subindex index. The fund provides -2x the daily performance of a gold index, the Bloomberg Gold Subindex. GLL was launched on Dec 1, 2008 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Inverse Gold ETFs Poised to Move Higher as FOMC Minutes Loom
data.text: Gold prices have recovered this week but face volatility ahead of the FOMC minutes report. Here are two inverse gold ETFs for bullion bears to watch.
